```erlang
-spec solve(list(), integer()) -> integer().

solve(nums, K) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Prefix = [0 | lists:foldl(fun(X, Acc) -> Acc bxor X end, 0, nums)],
    DP = lists:map(fun(I) -> lists:map(fun(J) -> if J == 1 -> Prefix[I]; true -> infinity end end, lists:seq(0, K)) end, lists:seq(0, N)),
    J_loop(2, K, DP, Prefix, N),
    lists:nth(K+1, lists:nth(N+1, DP)).

J_loop(_J, _K, _DP, _Prefix, _N) ->
    ok.

J_loop(J, K, DP, Prefix, N) when J > K ->
    ok;
J_loop(J, K, DP, Prefix, N) ->
    I_loop(J, N, J, DP, Prefix, N),
    J_loop(J+1, K, DP, Prefix, N).

I_loop(_J, _I, _J, _DP, _Prefix, _N) when _I > N ->
    ok;
I_loop(J, I, J, DP, Prefix, N) ->
    M_loop(J, I, J-1, DP, Prefix, N),
    I_loop(J, I+1, J, DP, Prefix, N).

M_loop(_J, _I, _M, _DP, _Prefix, _N) when _M >= I ->
    ok;
M_loop(J, I, M, DP, Prefix, N) ->
    CurrentMax = max(get_val(DP, M, J-1), Prefix[I] bxor Prefix[M]),
    NewDP = update_val(DP, I, J, CurrentMax),
    M_loop(J, I, M+1, NewDP, Prefix, N).

get_val(DP, M, J) ->
    lists:nth(M+1, DP),
    lists:nth(J+1, lists:nth(M+1, DP)).

update_val(DP, I, J, Value) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I+1, DP),
    NewRow = lists:sublist(Row, J, 1) ++ [Value] ++ lists:sublist(Row, J+2, length(Row)-J-1),
    lists:sublist(DP, I, 1) ++ [NewRow] ++ lists:sublist(DP, I+2, length(DP)-I-1).
```
